title: FIR Filter Design — Input Specification
description: Filter specifications for the FirDesign CLI. All keys except filter_order and csd_nnz have defaults.

filter_order.description: Number of FIR coefficients (including zeroth). Must be even for Bairstow rootfinding.

passband_edge.description: Normalized passband edge frequency (×π). e.g. 0.12 → 0.12π rad.

stopband_edge.description: Normalized stopband edge frequency (×π). e.g. 0.20 → 0.20π rad. Must be > passband_edge.

passband_ripple.description: Maximum passband ripple (linear, not dB). 0.125 ≈ ±1.0 dB ripple.

stopband_attenuation.description: Stopband attenuation target (linear, not dB). 0.125 ≈ -18 dB.

csd_nnz.description: Maximum non-zero CSD digits per coefficient. Hardware cost = csd_nnz − 1 adders/subtractors per tap.

discretization_factor.description: Frequency sampling density multiplier (Cheney's rule-of-thumb). m = discretization_factor × filter_order.

ellipsoid_radius.description: Initial ellipsoid radius — bounds the search region for autocorrelation coefficients.

parallel_cut.description: Use parallel cutting-plane for faster ellipsoid volume reduction.

verilog.description: Optional Verilog code generation. Omit to skip.

input_width.description: Bit width of the input signal x.

module_name.description: Name of the generated Verilog module.
